app.title: Sumbo
prompt.regionName.title: Region Name
prompt.profileName.title: Profile Name
prompt.groupInterval.title: Rotation Interval (sec)
dialog.cloneFailed.caption: Clone Failed
dialog.cloneFailed.body: The target window cannot be mirrored. It has closed or cannot be displayed.
dialog.clickThroughUnavailable.body: Click-through can't be enabled because its release hotkey ({0}) isn't registered. Check whether another app has taken the hotkey.
dialog.clickThroughUnavailable.caption: Click-Through Unavailable
dialog.clickForwardUnsupported.body: Clicks can't be forwarded to this window (unsupported target or privilege boundary, Win32 error {0}). Input forwarding is restricted for windows such as those running as administrator.
dialog.clickForwardUnsupported.caption: Click Forwarding Unsupported
dialog.regionSaveFailed.caption: Region Save Failed
dialog.profileSaveFailed.caption: Profile Save Failed
dialog.profileRestore.body: Couldn't find the target window for profile '{0}'. Right-click → Select Target Window to set it.
dialog.profileRestore.caption: Profile Restore
dialog.groupEmpty.body: The group is empty. Use 'Group ▸ Add Current Target to Group' to add windows to rotate.
dialog.groupSingle.body: Rotation can't start with only one window in the group — add another window first.
dialog.groupSwitch.caption: Group Switching
dialog.groupAllMissing.body: None of the group targets could be found; stopping rotation.
dialog.groupMemberMissing.body: Couldn't find group target '{0}'; skipping it this rotation.
dialog.dwmDisabled.body: DWM composition is disabled. Sumbo requires DWM composition.
dialog.dwmDisabled.caption: Cannot Start
dialog.hotkeyConflict.body: Failed to register these global hotkeys (taken by another app): {0}. Reassign them in Settings.
dialog.hotkeyConflict.caption: Hotkey Conflict
dialog.autoStartFailed.caption: Auto Start
tray.residentNotice.title: Sumbo is still running in the tray
tray.residentNotice.body: Closing the window does not exit the app. Use the tray icon to restore or exit.
update.dialog.caption: Update available
update.dialog.body: New version {0} is out — open the download page?
main.display.title: Display Settings
main.display.subtitle: Set the mirror size, screen anchor, and opacity.
main.behavior.subtitle: Interaction modes: click handling, lock, border, always-on-top, and hide-UI.
main.display.hideUi.hint: Leaves only the mirror · restore with ESC or a tray double-click
main.mode.clickForward.desc: Forward input to the mirror window.
main.mode.clickThrough.desc: Let clicks pass through the mirror window.
main.mode.aot.desc: Keep the mirror above other windows.
main.mirror.hint: Pick a window to mirror from the [Targets] panel ({0})
main.mirror.minimizedHint: The target window is minimized and its app stopped producing frames. Restore the window to resume the mirror.
main.region.subtitle: Click Select Region, then drag over the mirror to show only that part. (ESC to cancel)
main.profiles.subtitle: Save and restore the current mirror setup (target · region · opacity · border).
main.confirmDelete.caption: Confirm Delete
main.settings.subtitle: Configure language and startup behavior. Changes are saved immediately.
main.group.subtitle: Collect windows into a group and rotate the mirror through them. (Ctrl+Alt+G)
main.group.empty: (No members yet — add the current target)
main.hotkeys.subtitle: Global shortcuts. Rebinding arrives in a later cycle.
main.about.subtitle: Hide to watch — a DWM-based window mirroring tool
main.about.updateNote: Automatic updates aren't built in yet — check for the latest release below.
main.about.supportNote: Sumbo is free and open source. If it helps, please consider supporting development.
